sourceSummary.oneLine: BLUE 1417 / 1717 개발, 인증 및 평가, PP 내부 신뢰성, MRT 검증, 양산이관, DHF 문서 일정을 정리한 Master Schedule 상세일정입니다.
sourceSummary.officialUse: DHF Master Schedule에서 규격인증, 외부 성능 평가, 신뢰성 평가, 영상평가, MRT 검증, 양산이관 및 DHF 문서 29종 준비 상태를 추적하는 일정 자료로 사용할 수 있습니다.
keyPoints: 인증 및 평가 항목에 EMC, SAFETY, 무선, CHAGER 전자파, 운송, 방수/방진 및 외부 성능 평가가 포함됩니다.
외부 시험 또는 평가 기관으로 ACTS 및 SGS가 기재되어 있습니다.
DHF 문서 29종에는 개발 계획서, Master Schedule, 사용적합성 엔지니어링 계획서, 위험관리 계획서, 설계 입력, 라벨, Safety EMC Test Report, Clinical Evaluation Report, Software Validation Report 등이 포함됩니다.
MRT 검증 항목에는 DQE 측정, 무선 전송 속도 측정, AED 동작 조건, Preview Time, Cycle Time, 배터리 및 충전 시간 관련 검증이 포함됩니다.

entities.name: FDA
entities.evidence: 22. Clinical Evaluation Report (Retrofit FDA 인증 전까지)

concepts.name: Clinical Evaluation Report
concepts.evidence: 22. Clinical Evaluation Report (Retrofit FDA 인증 전까지)

evidence.claim: The source is a detailed Master Schedule for BLUE 1417 / 1717.
The schedule includes certification and evaluation work for 1717 samples.
Regulatory certification items include EMC, SAFETY, wireless, and charger electromagnetic testing.
Transport testing is described as drop and vibration testing.
Waterproof and dustproof testing is listed with ACTS and ACTS (1417).
External performance evaluation includes single-unit drop testing and single-unit surface pressure testing.
SGS is listed for single-unit surface pressure evaluation.
The schedule references MFDS.
The PP document section includes drawings, assembly drawings, inspection criteria, video, and BOM.
PP internal reliability samples include G1717CW, G1717FW, and G1417CW.
PP internal reliability samples also include G1417FW.
Quality environmental evaluation includes storage and operation tests for high temperature/high humidity, low temperature, high temperature, and thermal shock.
evidence.evidenceText: 품질팀 환경 평가,저장,고온고습 ... 동작,고온고습 ... 저온 ... 고온 ... 열충격

evidence.claim: Quality performance evaluation includes normal operation, power ON/OFF, aging, and BRIGHT repeated shooting.
evidence.evidenceText: 품질팀 성능 평가,일반동작 ... 전원 ON/OFF ... AGING ... BRIGHT반복촬영

evidence.claim: Image evaluation includes basic specification tests such as electrical noise, sensitivity, MTF/NNPS/DQE, NED, and SENR.
evidence.evidenceText: 기본스펙,ELECTRICAL NOISE (TOTAL) ... SENSITIVITY (LINEARRITY) ... MTF/NNPS/DQE ... NED(nGy) ... SENR(dB)

evidence.claim: Clinical evaluation work is listed as external and includes internal image acquisition for external request.
evidence.evidenceText: 임상평가,,외부,외부 의뢰를 위한 내부 이미지 획득

evidence.claim: MRT verification is listed as 27 items with a target date marker of ~3/31.
MRT verification includes DQE measurement and wireless transmission speed measurement.
evidence.evidenceText: MR1.1,DQE 측정 ... MR1.2.1,무선 전송 속도 측정

evidence.claim: AED operation verification includes minimum incident area, dose, incident time, low mA operation, full detector effective area, and false operation by external force.
evidence.evidenceText: AED 동작 최소 입사 면적 5 x 5cm2 ... AED 동작 최소 입사 면적 2.5µGy 이하 ... AED 동작 최소 입사 시간 5 msec.이상 ... AED 1mA의 낮은 mA값에서도 동작 ... AED 디텍터 전 유효 영역에서 만족 ... 외력 오동작

evidence.claim: Production transfer includes mold, jig, product standard, DHF documents, approval documents, manufacturing work instructions, quality inspection specifications, and SCM/sales entries.
evidence.evidenceText: 양산이관 ... 금형 ... JIG ... 제품표준서 ... DHF 문서 (29종) ... 승인원 ... 제조,작업지도서 ... 품질,검사규격서 ... SCM,없음 ... 영업,없음

evidence.claim: The DHF document list contains 29 named documents.
evidence.evidenceText: DHF 문서 (29종) ... 01. 개발 계획서 ... 29. 개발완료 보고서

evidence.claim: The DHF document list includes Safety EMC Test Report, Clinical Evaluation Report, Software Validation Report, risk management report, usability engineering report, PP completion report, production transfer handover, and development completion report.
evidence.evidenceText: 21. Safety EMC Test Report ... 22. Clinical Evaluation Report (Retrofit FDA 인증 전까지) ... 24. Software Validation Report ... 25. 위험관리 보고서 ... 26. 사용적합성 엔지니어링 보고서 ... 27. PP 완료 보고서 ... 28. 양산이관 인수인계서 ... 29. 개발완료 보고서

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is not explicitly present; month, week, and date columns are shown without a year.
Revision or version metadata is not present in the source text.
Authority or jurisdiction is ambiguous: MFDS and FDA are mentioned, but the source does not identify an issuing authority for this schedule.
The source appears to be a preprocessed spreadsheet with many empty cells and comma separators, so timeline placement and some row relationships may be difficult to verify.
Product signal metadata is Unclassified even though product/model-like strings such as BLUE 1417 / 1717, G1717CW, G1717FW, G1417CW, and G1417FW appear in the text.
